form.formComment: Last start produced a solid effort when 3rd over 2850m at Laval, beaten 14m by Louragan Du Digeon in 5yo race on March 5 at $25. Before that, unplaced over 2550m at Bordeaux well beaten by Liberte Cerise in 5yo mare race on February 22 at $60. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Resuming after 15 months off the scene. Scored at his only run last campaign recording by 16m as favourite at Vincennes beating Krack Clea in 4yo colts and gelding race on December 31 2024 at $2.90. In form and hard to beat.
